steps.title: Find the scale factor
steps.content: The original total mass $t$ is for $r$ identical objects. The new number of objects is $138r$, which is $138$ times as many objects.

steps.title: Scale the total mass
steps.content:
For identical objects, total mass scales by the same factor as the number of objects.
$$138\cdot t=138t$$
This matches choice D. The answer is D.
